title: After Bengal Verdict, Nirmala Sitharaman Marks BJP Win With Jhalmuri Post
description: Union Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman on Monday hailed the BJP's victory in the West Bengal Assembly polls, saying the people of the state have chosen to end an "oppressive" Trinamool Congress (TMC) regime that betrayed the ideals of "Maa, Mati, Manush".
